text:
mtpfs-1.1_2
Name           : mtpfs
Version        : 1.1_2
Installed on   : Sat Mar  5 08:24:42 2016 GMT
Origin         : sysutils/mtpfs
Architecture   : freebsd:11:x86:64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : sysutils
Licenses       : 
Maintainer     : john@pcbsd.org
WWW            : http://www.adebenham.com/mtpfs/
Comment        : MTP device filesystem
Shared Libs required:
	libmtp.so.9
	libmad.so.0
	libintl.so.8
	libgobject-2.0.so.0
	libid3tag.so.0
	libglib-2.0.so.0
	libgthread-2.0.so.0
	libfuse.so.2
	libgio-2.0.so.0
Annotations    :
	repo_type      : binary
	repository     : pcbsd-major
Flat size      : 31.8KiB
Description    :
MTPFS is a FUSE filesystem that supports reading and writing from any
MTP device (as supported by libmtp)

WWW: http://www.adebenham.com/mtpfs/
